PH 8 volume, 3NL, pus cells, 1-3, red blood cells, nil, epithelial cells, 0-1, color, cream white, viscosity, mucoid, concentration 0.1 x 10S, 6ML, ideal forms 3%, big head defects, 37%, mid-piece defects, 30%, bid-hee defects, 37%, mid-piece defects, 30%, pinhead defects, 37%, mid-piece defects, 37%, mid-piece defects, 4Os, ray defense, non-motile, 80%.
